## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss next steps for GrowthX and Lovable partnership, focusing on scope, pricing, and timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Lovable aims for a quick, high-visibility win (e.g., templates library) before committing to a broader partnership](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Current SOW needs refinement to align with Lovable's goals and organizational changes](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Kickoff planned for September 2nd, with a follow-up meeting scheduled for August 26th at 12:30 PM to address remaining questions](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

## Topics

### Lovable's Current Situation and Goals

  - [11,000 unconverted leads highlight urgent sales needs](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Organizational changes: Ceci becoming head of marketing, new head of sales starting soon](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [High branded traffic, low non-branded traffic identified as key issue](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Aim: Quick, high-visibility win (e.g., templates library) to demonstrate value before full partnership](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Partnership Scope and Pricing

  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint: $30,000 fixed fee](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Growth execution: $15,000/month for editorial and refresh (may expand)](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Potential additional services: templates library, prompts library, programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Lovable requests clearer definitions and expected outcomes for each service offering](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [August 22nd: Ceci to review plans with Elena (CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [August 26th, 12:30 PM: Follow-up meeting with Marcel to address remaining questions](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [September 2nd: Proposed kickoff date (avoiding Labor Day disruption)](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

### SOW Refinement

  - [Current SOW needs updating to reflect:](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
    1.  Reduced initial strategy sprint
    2.  Addition of high-visibility win (e.g., templates/prompt library) in first 8 weeks
    3.  Clearer deliverables for Phase 2

### GrowthX Events

  - [Dinner at Takari on Monday (August 28th)](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Happy hour at 25 Lux during Inbound conference (August 31st)](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ceci to review partnership plans with Elena (CEO) on August 22nd](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare updated SOW reflecting Lovable's requests](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Marcel to provide clarity on investment for additional services beyond editorial/refresh](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Ceci to share event invitations with Rachel Hepworth (Lovable advisor, ex-Notion CMO)](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Confirm kickoff for September 2nd after August 26th meeting](https://fathom.video/share/ssa4VQdNrsTdDe7WyU8AeC17Sk8jgzxH?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
